---
title: "The Pulse of Red Light Therapy Research"
subtitle: "INFO 526 - Spring 2026 - Project 2"
author: "Vivian Huynh & Levi Hood"
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-image: images/rlt.png
  data-background-size: stretch
  data-background-opacity: "0.7"
  data-slide-number: none
format:
  revealjs:
    theme:  ['data/customtheming.scss']
  
editor: visual
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| label: load-packages
#| include: false

# Load packages here
pacman::p_load(tidymodels,
               tidyverse)

```

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

# Plot theme
ggplot2::theme_set(ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11))

# For better figure resolution
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.retina = 3, 
  dpi = 300, 
  fig.width = 6, 
  fig.asp = 0.618 
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: load-data
#| include: false
# Load data here
data(mtcars)
mtcars$speed <- mtcars$hp / mtcars$wt

data("penguins")
```

## Summary

-   Intro

-   Background

-   Reasoning

-   Methods

-   Visualizations

## What is Photobiomodulation Therapy?

## Why We Choose This Topic

## Data Preparation

### Example:

```{r}

  #   #split conditions into separate rows 
  #   separate_longer_delim(condition, delim = ";") |>
  # mutate(condition = str_trim(condition)) |>
  # filter(condition != "", !is.na(condition)) |> #added empty string filters to catch blank rows created by splitting
  # mutate(condition = case_when(
  #   str_detect(condition, regex("alzheimer|dementia.*alzheimer|alzheimer.*dementia", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Alzheimer's",



```
